title: Delightfully Dangerous
writer: Frank Tashlin, Edward Verdier, Irving Phillips
actors: Jane Powell, Ralph Bellamy, Constance Moore
plot: Young Sherry Williams dreams of having a singing career, and she idolizes her older sister Josephine, who has gone to New York to perform on the stage. When Sherry is distraught just before performing at her school, a visiting Bro...
